skills.name: Tempest Flurry
skills.role: Main damage dealer. Scales with Invoker elemental penetration.

skills.name: Falling Thunder
skills.role: Burst damage on shocked enemies. Invoker penetration makes it hit harder.

skills.name: Thunderstorm
skills.role: AoE clear. Needs Shock Conduction II + Overcharge.

skills.name: Orb of Storms
skills.role: Sustained damage. Invoker spell scaling boosts this significantly.

skills.name: Tempest Bell
skills.role: Crowd control and stun. Utility skill.

skills.name: Mana Drain
skills.role: Mana sustain. Essential for sustained combat.

skills.name: Siphoning Strike
skills.role: Life and mana leech. Keeps you alive.

skills.name: Herald of Thunder
skills.role: Herald. Invoker scales heralds hard. Key endgame skill.

skills.name: Mana Remnants
skills.role: Mana sustain on kill. Pairs with Mana Drain.

upgrades.reason: 100% shock chain across enemies. Cornerstone combo for lightning Monk.
Chain bounces bolts between enemies. AoE expands orb radius.
Boosts shock magnitude from Falling Thunder hits.

key_benefits: Elemental penetration — lightning damage actually lands
Spell scaling — Orb of Storms, Thunderstorm hit harder
Herald scaling — Herald of Thunder becomes endgame powerhouse
Shock magnitude — more shock = more damage across entire kit
Invoker.power_spike: Before Invoker: You deal lightning damage. After Invoker: You deal lightning damage THAT ACTUALLY LANDS.
